title: Manifold OAuth2 Authentication API Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions for the Manifold OAuth2 Authentication API request and response payloads.

VerifyRequest.title: VerifyRequest
VerifyRequest.description: Request body for POST /verify (Signature Grant). Provides the session token obtained from the Manifold frontend client.

token.description: The session token retrieved from the Manifold Ethereum Provider or the `m-authenticated` event on the frontend.

VerifyResponse.title: VerifyResponse
VerifyResponse.description: Successful response from POST /verify containing the authenticated wallet address.

address.description: The Ethereum wallet address of the authenticated user.

TokenRequest.title: TokenRequest
TokenRequest.description: Request body for POST /token (Authorization Code Grant). Exchanges a one-time code for a long-lived access token.

clientId.description: The client ID for the Developer App, obtained from the Manifold Developer Portal.

code.description: The one-time authorization code received after the user completes the OAuth2 authorization flow.

clientSecret.description: The client secret for the Developer App, obtained from the Manifold Developer Portal.

signature.description: A cryptographic signature used to authenticate the token exchange request.

TokenResponse.title: TokenResponse
TokenResponse.description: Successful response from POST /token containing a 30-day access token.

access_token.description: A 30-day access token for server-side access to private Manifold user data.

expires_in.description: Token lifetime in seconds. Typically 2592000 (30 days).

ErrorResponse.title: ErrorResponse
ErrorResponse.description: Error response returned when authentication or validation fails.
